holdings.infoBox: ACGO is an equity ETF with a total of 71 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 12.69%, Alphabet at 9.54%, Apple at 7.20%, Broadcom at 4.80%, and Microsoft at 4.19%.

overview.description: The Hartford Alpha Capture Growth ETF (ACGO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively invests in US equity securities with attractive growth characteristics as selected using fundamental research. The fund may hold securities of any market-cap but will generally focus on large-caps. ACGO was launched on Jun 2, 2026 and is issued by The Hartford.
